title: Aligned clients find me easily
subtitle: A present-tense affirmation for building trust that the right work connections are coming.
excerpt: A short affirmation from Day 46 of the MONEY program. For when taking on misaligned work feels safer than holding out for the right fit.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 46 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).

content.text: A short affirmation from Day 46 of the MONEY program. The line is a direct counter to the story that you have to take whatever comes, that better-fit clients, partners, or collaborators are not reliably available to you.
The right people find me easily. I attract clients who value my work. I work only with ideal matches.
Say it three times. The sequence matters: the first sentence is a claim, the second is evidence, the third is the result. Let each settle before moving to the next.
Adapted from Day 46 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
